response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content to identify two vocal segments. 2. Identified the first song as '男のコになりたい' (Otoko no ko ni naritai) by Mafumafu, based on on-screen text and performance. 3. Identified the second song as 'SWEET MEMORIES' by Seiko Matsuda, based on on-screen text credits (Lyrics: Takashi Matsumoto, Music: Masaaki Omura). 4. Searched for official Japanese lyrics and English translations for both songs using original artists/composers. 5. Compiled the scenes, timestamps, descriptions, and full lyrics into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two vocal performances by Hololive VTubers. The first song is 'Otoko no ko ni naritai' (I Want to Become a Boy) by Mafumafu, and the second is a cover of 'SWEET MEMORIES' originally by Seiko Matsuda. The performance is set in a stage environment with lighting and audience interaction.

scenes.description: The video starts with two VTubers performing the song 'Otoko no ko ni naritai' on a stage with a digital cityscape background. The song title is displayed in the top-left corner.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, I want to become a boy
Please, is that okay?
Through a forest filled with chocolate
And riding on an orange pumpkin
I’m carried away and guided
To a milky white castle
I’m sure everyone longs for
The heroine of a fairytale
In the dream I once saw
I wanted glass high heels
Secret feelings, true feelings
Let me confess them to you
1, 2, 3! With a little magic
I want to become a new me, please
In the end, I want to be cool too
I want to be cool like that boy
Wearing a frilly dress
I’m the real hero in this world
With a little courage, a big beginning
Even if I’ll be scared and trembling
I want to become a boy!
Please, is that okay?
Can I be cool?
Even as I grow up
This strange voice of mine doesn’t change
No matter what I try to do
“Today” just doesn’t go smoothly
Then!
In my dreams, even if only for a moment
I’ll try to find myself
Just a little, maybe just a little
I feel like I can change
My heart is pounding, my heart is pounding
I can’t sleep at night
1, 2, 3! If I can be a little braver
The entrance to that fairytale is right before me
With my gaze lifted to the sunrise
With a single blink, even quarrels fade
When I tie this small ribbon
I’m the hero who brings the world together
As if I could make flowers blush
As if I could belong to myself just a little more
I want to become a boy like that!
Can I stay by your side?
Everything that looks ordinary
Looks different to me
1, 2, 3! With a little magic
I want to become a new me, please!
In the end, I want to be cool too
I want to be cool like that boy
With my head tilted just a little
For now, I can be a hero
I hide this precious today
Before I lose my true self
I want to become a boy!
Please, is that okay?
Can I be cool?
This is a secret, okay!

scenes.description: The first song ends, and the stage goes dark with light effects, transitioning into the next performance.
The performers begin the song 'SWEET MEMORIES'. Text on screen indicates: Lyrics: Takashi Matsumoto, Music: Masaaki Omura. The VTubers continue their performance on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
なつかしい 痛みだわ
ずっと前に 忘れていた
でもあなたを見たとき
時間だけ 後戻りしたの
「幸福？」と 聞かないで
嘘つくのは上手じゃない
友だちならいるけど
あんなには燃えあがれなくて
失った夢だけが
美しく見えるのは何故かしら
過ぎ去った優しさも
今は甘い記憶 Sweet memories
Don't kiss me baby
We can never be
So don't add more pain
Please don't hurt me again
I have spent so many nights
Thinking of you
Longing for your touch
I have once loved you so much
あの頃は若過ぎて
悪戯に傷つけあった二人
色褪せた 哀しみも
今は遠い記憶 Sweet memories
失った 夢だけが
美しく 見えるのは何故かしら
過ぎ去った 優しさも
今は甘い記憶 Sweet memories
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's a nostalgic pain
I forgot a long time ago
But when I saw you
I went back in time
Don't ask "Happy?"
I'm not good at lying
I have friends though
I can't get fired up like that
Only the dreams I lost
Why does it look beautiful?
The kindness that has passed is now
Sweet memories
Don't kiss me baby
We can never be
So don't add more pain
Please don't hurt me again
I have spent so many nights
Thinking of you longing for your touch
I have once loved you so much
I was too young then
Two people who hurt each other due to a prank
Even the faded sadness is now
Distant memories sweet memories
Only the dreams I lost
Why does it look beautiful?
The kindness that has passed is now
Sweet memories
